products.name: ET Series (EnduroLink 2.0)
products.descriptor: Next-generation UAV fluid quick disconnect coupler series

evidence.snippet:
ET Series begins a New Era for Quick Disconnects
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/PkCGUhz6lycPpD7GWQ8Qf9DvWAUddW9Ge4SOLSuY.png)
We once again redefine the quick disconnect product group by releasing ET Series(EnduroLink 2.0). The evolution of a legendary UAV quick disconnect coupler.

products.name: EL Series (EnduroLink)
products.descriptor: UAV fluid quick disconnect coupler series, world-standard design

evidence.snippet:
EnduroLink is Born
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/lIEZTA4oL5TgveqyicGX2StcsFIa9osg0i1Trs9Y.png)
We design and begin manufacturing of EnduroLink/EL Series.

products.name: MC Series
products.descriptor: UAV one-way fuel flow check valve series

evidence.snippet:
HP Series and MC Series
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/d646W2f45xItlNSiK0U62aTA5MCQ8hbeajj8wnnS.png)
HP Series is made as only high pressure quick connect fluid coupling series available designed first to meet MIL-DTL-25427B and MC Series is designed for use in the UAV unmanned air vehicle industry, enabling fuel flow in one direction only.

products.name: SS Series (Servo Saver)
products.descriptor: UAV servo saver with built-in clutch to prevent servo burnout

evidence.snippet:
Servo Saver is Born
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/Gx6pRvJdWNlGUtlmRsOfPDS5apqv1szC0uxqz2k3.png)
UAV servo savers rejoice, the Servo Saver SS Series is born with a built-in clutch system that prevents your servos from burning out.

products.name: CA Series
products.descriptor: UAV control rod linkage series

evidence.snippet:
Control Rods a Fuel Bladder and Electronic Fueler
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/UXA4cOnVeKWoHEU4TFry17GlKt3qmuEFlKCdXP0B.png)
Our CA Series of control rod linkages are created. A revolutionary new fuel bladder design is unveiled along with a new electronic fueler system.

products.name: PX Series
products.descriptor: UAV propeller series, including pusher propellers for military platforms

evidence.snippet:
Aerosonde MK. 4.7 HQ
Textron’s Aerosonde new VTOL military drone. It’s jammed with Cayuga Ontario designed and produced technology including the main pusher propellor. Daniel Fenton, Steve Fenton and Propellor Designer Fadi Mishriky attending.
[Visit Textron Systems](https://www.textronsystems.com/) [Explore PX Series](https://www.battlefield.biz/series/44)

products.name: 01Y and 02Y Series
products.descriptor: Early UAV fluid quick disconnect series, first deployed on Textron AAI Shadow

evidence.snippet:
First UAV Customer Secured, 01Y and 02Y Series
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/ac3gQb45nf5R4LO9wy7MLtGeSPDMTVAEi5HZHNyR.png)
Secured and began work with Textron AAI on the Shadow UAV platform. We release the 01Y and 02Y quick disconnect series.

products.name: HP Series
products.descriptor: High-pressure quick connect fluid coupling series per MIL-DTL-25427B

evidence.snippet:
HP Series and MC Series
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/d646W2f45xItlNSiK0U62aTA5MCQ8hbeajj8wnnS.png)
HP Series is made as only high pressure quick connect fluid coupling series available designed first to meet MIL-DTL-25427B and MC Series is designed for use in the UAV unmanned air vehicle industry, enabling fuel flow in one direction only.

products.name: DL Series
products.descriptor: Dry-break quick disconnect coupler based on EnduroLink design, zero fluid loss

evidence.snippet:
LS Series & DL Series Released
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/biXG4LFkoslP5uxXmev6NiEl9UOy7hI4mcSdfTsh.png)
We get to work on 2 new quick disconnect series. LS Series is designed to fewer spares and experience less coupler-related vehicle down time, reducing repair requirements. DL Series is designed based off of our world-standard EnduroLink™ couplers, DL Series enables connection and disconnection without any fluid loss.

products.name: Posi-Fuel
products.descriptor: Positive-feed UAV fuel system component

evidence.snippet:
Posi-Fuel
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/iRYzTy6OWh9WGldv1Rj3q8DoE0zlFWn2l9y14L6d.png)
Posi-fuel is created.

products.name: Fuel Bladder
products.descriptor: Patented flexible UAV fuel storage bladder

evidence.snippet:
Fuel Bladder Patent Secured
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/rIWw7PHv0LwONz3v5XuMYsmGUxepRyuxwQ0rOYGd.png)
A patent for our revolutionary fuel bladder design is secured.

products.name: LS Series
products.descriptor: Quick disconnect coupler series designed to reduce spares and vehicle downtime

evidence.snippet:
LS Series & DL Series Released
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/biXG4LFkoslP5uxXmev6NiEl9UOy7hI4mcSdfTsh.png)
We get to work on 2 new quick disconnect series. LS Series is designed to fewer spares and experience less coupler-related vehicle down time, reducing repair requirements. DL Series is designed based off of our world-standard EnduroLink™ couplers, DL Series enables connection and disconnection without any fluid loss.

products.name: VL Series
products.descriptor: Land systems quick disconnect coupler series for armoured vehicle applications

evidence.snippet:
VL Series is born, we enter into the Land Systems Market while expanding facility
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/MO9Ncg18y0Dwcuq9BCivsnYZ2UMsFNmsJWj1WrPK.png)
GDLS Contract announcement brings Battlefield International into the land systems market. VL Series is designed and we expand into our second facility on Link Road, just minutes away from our main plant.

products.name: HT Series
products.descriptor: High-performance high-pressure threaded quick disconnect coupling

evidence.snippet:
FW Series and HT/LT Threaded QDs
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/ULQk3fv4ZJ3aDAcVwjeUpMOtBdzGRxmUL2OAyonl.png)
We create a new filter series, FW Series. HT and LT Series are high-performance, high pressure, thread type couplings that can be coupled by hand or with the aid of a spanner tool to overcome limited system pressure.

products.name: LT Series
products.descriptor: High-performance high-pressure threaded quick disconnect coupling, hand or spanner coupled

evidence.snippet:
FW Series and HT/LT Threaded QDs
![image alt text](https://www.battlefield.biz/storage/images/ULQk3fv4ZJ3aDAcVwjeUpMOtBdzGRxmUL2OAyonl.png)
We create a new filter series, FW Series. HT and LT Series are high-performance, high pressure, thread type couplings that can be coupled by hand or with the aid of a spanner tool to overcome limited system pressure.

unresolved_questions: All 10 prioritized products were found, each on a dedicated /series/N page. Individual SKU part numbers are loaded dynamically (JavaScript-rendered) and were not captured in the text extracts, so granularity is recorded as 'family' for all series rather than individual SKUs.

NDAA status is 'not_disclosed' for all products: the site displays AS9100D/ISO9001 certification and 'Made in Canada' on every product page, but no product-specific NDAA Section 848/889 claim is made.
The Aerospace and Defense catalogue PDF was skipped; it may contain individual part numbers, specs, and compliance details that would allow SKU-level entries.

fetch_requests.reason: Catalogue PDF likely contains individual part numbers and specs for all series, enabling SKU-level granularity and potentially NDAA/compliance claims for specific products.
fetch_requests.source_hint: crawl_index status=skipped_budget, page_class=document, linked from /series/1 and others

fetch_requests.reason: Main products index page; may enumerate additional series or product categories not captured in the 10 seed series pages.
